meaning: n.影响,感化,势力,有影响的人(或事),(电磁)感应vt.影响,改变
examples: He's never had any influence over her.
Don't let me influence you either way.
His influence has diminished with time.
Of course, with less aid as leverage, the United States could lose influence in the region.
We can only influence them when we prove to them that we are doing the right thing.
